module.name: client
module.purpose: Client crate namespace for the restored marix_client library and client binaries. lib.rs declares event/session modules and re-exports ClientEvent and ClientSession, while Cargo.toml declares the marix_client lib target plus marix-client-cli (cli/main.rs) and marix-client-app (app/main.rs) bin targets.

childModules.name: app
childModules.purpose: Contains the placeholder marix-client-app binary entrypoint.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: Contains the marix-client-cli command-line binary entrypoint, which imports ClientEvent and ClientSession from the marix_client library and drives task submission plus event draining.
